---
title: "Argentina libertaria en un mundo en conflicto"
author: "OEP"
date: 2025-10-02
---

Conversatorio abierto en el marco de la Diplomatura "Cuestiones Socioeconómicas Fundamentales de la Argentina Actual". Conversamos con Telma Luzzani. 

::: {.ratio .ratio-16x9}
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/1I8xjVrwGlw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
:::

::: {.callout-tip appearance="minimal" icon=false}
[Ver en YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1I8xjVrwGlw){.btn .btn-outline-danger .btn-sm}
[Ver canal del OEP](https://youtube.com/@observatorioeconomiapolitica){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::
